data.body: DONE. mutmut 3.6.0 wired ([tool.mutmut] in pyproject, dev-venv runner, docs/mutation-testing.md with recorded baseline). next_batch.py mapped score 62.7%->99.2% (survivors 236->6); reducer/_processors.py 97.3%->99.4%. Rewrote the assertion-light next_batch compute test to assert the full batch-item contract; added tests/interfaces/test_next_batch_behavior.py (13) + tests/scripts/reducer/test_reducer_record_fields.py (10) to kill high-value survivors. Remaining survivors documented as equivalents. Suite green (broad 1749 + integration 8); ruff clean. Implemented + independently reviewed (opus reviewer: APPROVE-WITH-NITS, confirmed via intentional-mutation kill checks). Commit 369d82ea.
